name: Queclink Wireless Solutions Co., Ltd.
summary: Queclink Wireless Solutions Co., Ltd. supplies wireless machine-to-machine devices and solutions worldwide. The company offers asset trackers, personal trackers, vehicle trackers, accessories, and animal identification tags, as well as ODM services. It provides products for automotive tracking, fleet management, tracking and tracing, lone worker safety, mobile health care, remote monitoring and control of various assets, and wireless alarms to cover applications through the Internet. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
